pain_point: Frequent compliance changes + eTIMS friction + filing pressure causes delays and penalties.
solution: 2-week audit of workflows, templates, and filing calendar; implement quick fixes; handover playbook.
proof_signals: High-severity eTIMS updates + elevated compliance pressure index.
mvp_scope: Checklist, calendar, templates, dashboard snapshot + training session

pain_point: Hard to track deadlines, policy changes, and reconciliation risks across departments.
solution: Dashboard + alerts for events, deadlines, and filing readiness with audit trail and reconciliations.
proof_signals: Rising events count + workflow stage heatmap hotspots (Filing/Reconciliation).
mvp_scope: Events timeline, reminders, readiness checklist, simple reconciliations + export
